entity.summary: Thailand-founded centralized digital-asset platform operational since December 2019, with a globally accessible Bitazza service and region-specific access restrictions documented in April 2026.
entity.notes: Bitazza was founded in 2018 and began regulated Thai operations in December 2019. An April 2026 official notice said the global platform continued operating normally while local regulatory frameworks could limit access in particular regions, including Thailand.

events.title: Bitazza began regulated operations
events.description: Bitazza began operating in December 2019 under Thailand's digital-asset regulatory framework after the company was founded in 2018.
events.notes: The reviewed sources identify December 2019 but not a precise day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level date placeholder.

events.title: Bitazza Global clarified regional access limits
events.description: Bitazza stated that its global platform remained in normal operation while regulatory frameworks could restrict access for users in certain regions, including Thailand.
events.notes: The announcement documented regional access limits without indicating a global platform shutdown.

evidence.title: Bitazza official platform
evidence.notes: Official platform verifies the current Bitazza identity and active global services.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitazza
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile used to corroborate the Bitazza exchange identity.

evidence.title: Bitazza Thailand marks six years of regulated growth
evidence.notes: Company-issued anniversary release states that Bitazza was founded in 2018 and operational since December 2019.

evidence.title: Bitazza Global platform remains accessible globally
evidence.notes: Official notice confirms continued global operation while documenting possible regional access limitations.

evidence.title: CoinMarketCap exchange profile for Bitazza
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile identifies Bitazza as founded in 2018 and operating as a centralized digital-asset platform.
